name: registry_set_asep_reg_keys_modification_currentversion_nt
raw_query: any where (registry.path:"*\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows NT\\CurrentVersion*" and (registry.path like~ ("*\\Winlogon\\VmApplet*", "*\\Winlogon\\Userinit*", "*\\Winlogon\\Taskman*", "*\\Winlogon\\Shell*", "*\\Winlogon\\GpExtensions*", "*\\Winlogon\\AppSetup*", "*\\Winlogon\\AlternateShells\\AvailableShells*", "*\\Windows\\IconServiceLib*", "*\\Windows\\Appinit_Dlls*", "*\\Image File Execution Options*", "*\\Font Drivers*", "*\\Drivers32*", "*\\Windows\\Run*", "*\\Windows\\Load*"))) and (not (winlog.event_data.Details:"(Empty)" or (?winlog.event_data.Details == null) or process.executable:"C:\\Windows\\System32\\poqexec.exe" or (registry.path:"*\\Image File Execution Options\\*" and (registry.path like~ ("*\\DisableExceptionChainValidation", "*\\MitigationOptions"))) or (process.executable:"C:\\Windows\\system32\\svchost.exe" and (registry.path like~ ("*\\Winlogon\\GPExtensions\\{827D319E-6EAC-11D2-A4EA-00C04F79F83A}\\PreviousPolicyAreas*", "*\\Winlogon\\GPExtensions\\{827D319E-6EAC-11D2-A4EA-00C04F79F83A}\\MaxNoGPOListChangesInterval*")) and (winlog.event_data.Details like~ ("DWORD (0x00000001)", "DWORD (0x00000009)", "DWORD (0x000003c0)"))) or (process.executable:"C:\\Windows\\System32\\RuntimeBroker.exe" and registry.path:"*\\runtimebroker.exe\\Microsoft.Windows.ShellExperienceHost*"))) and (not ((process.executable:"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\Temp\\*" and process.executable:"*\\MicrosoftEdgeUpdate.exe") or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Avira\\Antivirus\\avguard.exe*", "C:\\Program Files\\Avira\\Antivirus\\avguard.exe*")) and registry.path:"*SOFTWARE\\WOW6432Node\\Avira\\Antivirus\\Overwrite_Keys\\HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows NT\\CurrentVersion\\Winlogon\\*" and (registry.path like~ ("*\\userinit\\UseAsDefault", "*\\shell\\UseAsDefault")) and (winlog.event_data.Details like~ ("explorer.exe", "C:\\Windows\\system32\\userinit.exe,"))) or ((registry.path like~ ("*\\ClickToRunStore\\HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows NT\\CurrentVersion\\*", "*\\ClickToRun\\REGISTRY\\MACHINE\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows NT\\CurrentVersion\\*")) or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Office\\root\\integration\\integrator.exe", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft Office\\root\\integration\\integrator.exe"))) or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Common Files\\Microsoft Shared\\ClickToRun\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Common Files\\Microsoft Shared\\ClickToRun\\Updates\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\OfficeClickToRun.exe") or (process.executable:"C:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\Framework*" and process.executable:"*\\ngen.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\OneDrive\\StandaloneUpdater\\OneDriveSetup.exe" and registry.path:"*\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\RunOnce\\Delete Cached Update Binary" and winlog.event_data.Details:"C:\\Windows\\system32\\cmd.exe /q /c del /q \"C:\\Users\\*" and winlog.event_data.Details:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\OneDrive\\Update\\OneDriveSetup.exe\"")))
